---
name: Destination Request
about: Request a new destination page for the WanderSafe platform
title: "[DESTINATION] "
labels: destination-request
assignees: ''
---

**Destination name and country:**

**Why this destination matters for LGBTQ+ travelers:**
(High demand? Significant safety gap? Specific risk context?)

**What you know about LGBTQ+ legal status there:**
(Any sources welcome — news, ILGA, personal experience)

**Data sources you're aware of:**
(Equaldex, HRW, community orgs, local resources)

**Your connection to this destination:**
(Lived experience, research, advocacy work — optional)

---
Note: WanderSafe prioritizes destinations where the safety intelligence gap is largest — particularly criminalized countries, countries with documented digital exploitation, and high-demand LGBTQ+ travel destinations underserved by existing guides.
